  1. org.springframework.ai.tool

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.tool

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.tool
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai
 
org.springframework.ai.mcp
Core support for Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration in Spring AI.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.server.common.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai
 
org.springframework.ai.model.tool
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api
 
org.springframework.ai.openai
 
org.springframework.ai.support
 
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor
Test support classes for ChatClient advisor integration tests.
org.springframework.ai.tool

org.springframework.ai.tool.function

org.springframework.ai.tool.support
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.tool used by org.springframework.ai.anthropic
    Class
    Description
    ToolCallback
    Represents a tool whose execution can be triggered by an AI model.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.tool used by org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
    Class
    Description
    ToolCallback
    Represents a tool whose execution can be triggered by an AI model.

    Class
    Description
    ToolCallback
    Represents a tool whose execution can be triggered by an AI model.
    ToolCallbackProvider
    Provides ToolCallback instances for tools defined in different sources.
